hooks.command: case "$TOOL_INPUT" in *'php bin/console'*|*'composer '*) echo 'BLOCK: Utiliser docker compose exec php pour les commandes PHP/Composer (regle CLAUDE.md #1)' ;; *'npm '*|*'yarn '*|*'npx '*) echo 'BLOCK: Node.js interdit — utiliser AssetMapper (regle CLAUDE.md #2)' ;; esac

FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path"\s*:\s*"\K[^"]+' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.php$'; then grep -n 'dd(\|dump(\|var_dump(\|error_log(\|print_r(' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -5 | while read line; do echo "⚠️  Debug statement detecte: $line"; done; fi

FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path"\s*:\s*"\K[^"]+' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.php$'; then grep -n 'dd(\|dump(\|var_dump(\|error_log(\|print_r(' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -5 | while read line; do echo "⚠️  Debug statement detecte: $line"; done; fi
